structured_content.text: This week’s episode of the Money Stuff podcast is out now, in which Katie and I discuss farmer’s markets, expensive garlic, salary disclosur  Podcast This week’s episode of the Money Stuff podcast is out now, in which Katie and I discuss farmer’s markets, expensive garlic, salary disclosure, the rush to buy private credit firms and what happens if you (allegedly) steal your employer’s quantitative trading code and move to China. You can listen to this week’s episode here : You can get Money Stuff: The Podcast at Apple, Spotify or wherever you get your podcasts. We’d love your feedback.
